persona.name: Tyrone Bishop
persona.background: On the road constantly and often can't remember which card or account a charge hit. Tends to drift off-topic with stories before circling back to the actual request.

user_goals: Find out the status of the fraud report he filed two days ago on his debit card
Understand why his card is being declined at truck stops right now
Confirm he still has money in his account that he can actually access
Get access to his own funds restored so he isn't stranded on the road without a working card
Make sure the fraud case keeps moving and doesn't get dropped
Get something in writing confirming his available balance he can use at the counter

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_fraud_case_status
tools.description: Check the status of an existing fraud investigation by case ID. Requires verified identity. Returns the current investigation stage and any resolution.

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Use the transaction ID from get_transaction_history. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

tools.name: freeze_account
tools.description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions, typically in response to suspected fraud or a lost card. Requires verified identity. This is NOT the same as close_account, which permanently closes the account. Prefer this over closure when the customer simply needs to stop activity while an issue is investigated.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

tools.name: close_account
tools.description: Permanently close an account and disburse any remaining balance. Requires verified identity AND explicit customer confirmation. This is IRREVERSIBLE and high-impact — do not call it for temporary holds (use freeze_account) or as a substitute for fraud reporting. The account must have a zero or positive balance to close.

parameters.name: disbursement_account_id
parameters.description: Account to send any remaining balance to

parameters.name: confirmation
parameters.description: Explicit customer confirmation that they want to permanently close

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

initial_message: Hey there, so funny story, I'm sitting at a truck stop in the middle of nowhere and my card just got declined for diesel and a sandwich. I reported some weird charges a couple days back and they froze the card, which fine, but now I literally can't buy fuel. Can you tell me what's going on with my account?

fraud_cases.note: case processor timed out; stuck awaiting retry, card freeze applied and not lifted

expected_state_changes.goal: Find out the status of the fraud report he filed two days ago on his debit card
Make sure the fraud case keeps moving and doesn't get dropped
Get something in writing confirming his available balance he can use at the counter
Get access to his own funds restored so he isn't stranded on the road without a working card

value.note: case processor timed out; stuck awaiting retry, card freeze applied and not lifted

expected_state_changes.goal: Make sure the fraud case keeps moving and doesn't get dropped

rubric_criteria.text: Agent retrieved the status of the fraud case (FRD-4471) the customer filed two days ago.
Agent explained his card is being declined because the freeze from the stuck fraud case was never lifted.
Agent escalated the stalled fraud case (FRD-4471) so it keeps moving, citing the processor timeout.
Agent restored access to the customer's funds so his account status is active and usable.
Agent generated a balance_confirmation document on PERS-CHK-905 confirming his available balance he can show at the counter.
